valuesPreferenceDescription.value: Shows values on graph axes, reference line, "Slope of Tangent", and "Net Signed Area".

predictPreferenceDescription.value: Adds a mode that allows you to predict f of {{variable}}.

areaUnderCurveToolOrReferenceLine.value: Area Under Curve Tool or Reference Line

readValues.value: With screen reader enabled, read values

widthPattern.value: Right now, Curve Manipulation Type is {$curveManipulationType}. Shape width is {$width}. {$curveSentence}

noWidthPattern.value: Right now, Curve Manipulation Type is {$curveManipulationType}. {$curveSentence}

predict.value: Predict f, in Primary Graph Area

secondDerivative.value: Second Derivative, in Second Derivative Graph Area

controlArea.value:
You can add Exploration Tools to the graph areas to promote making connections between values on each graph.
Reset the sim to start over.

screenButtonsHelpText.value: Manipulate a graph and explore its derivative curve in real time.

playArea.value:
There is an interactive curve in the Primary Graph Area representing the graph of f and a 
derived non interactive curve representing the derivative of f. You can choose a Curve Manipulation Type
to modify the curve in different ways in the Primary Graph Area at any point. There are 
Exploration Tools allowing flexible investigation of all curves with {$variable} coordinates aligned.

interactionHint.value:
Get started by finding the Curve Manipulator. Grab manipulator to modify curve in any direction.
Use Exploration Tools to investigate steepness of f curve at different points.

screenButtonsHelpText.value: Manipulate a graph and explore its integral curve in real time.

playArea.value:
There is an interactive curve in the Primary Graph Area representing the graph of f and a
derived non interactive curve representing the integral of f. You can choose a Curve Manipulation Type to
modify the curve in different ways in the Primary Graph Area at any point. There are Exploration
Tools allowing flexible investigation of all curves with {$variable} coordinates aligned.

interactionHint.value:
Get started by finding the Curve Manipulator. Grab manipulator to modify curve in any direction.
Use Exploration Tools to investigate net signed area under f curve bounded by horizontal axis 
and f of {$variable} starting from left.

screenButtonsHelpText.value:
Manipulate a graph and explore its derivative and integral curves in real time,
with or without discontinuities.

playArea.value:
There is an interactive curve in the Primary Graph Area representing the graph of f and
derived non interactive curves in other Graph Areas. You can choose a Curve Manipulation Type to
modify the curve in different ways in the Primary Graph Area at any point. You can change
which set of two Graph Areas are viewable: Integral and Primary or Primary and Derivative.
There are Exploration Tools allowing flexible investigation of all viewable curves with
{$variable} coordinates aligned.

interactionHint.value:
Get started by finding the Curve Manipulator. Grab manipulator to modify curve in any direction.
Use Exploration Tools to explore relationships between graphs in viewable graph set.

screenButtonsHelpText.value:
Manipulate a graph and explore its integral, derivative, and second derivative curves in 
real time, with or without discontinuities.

playArea.value:
There is an interactive curve in the Primary Graph Area representing the graph of f and
derived non interactive curves in other Graphs Areas. You can choose a Curve Manipulation Type
to modify the curve in different ways in the Primary Graph Area at any point. You can change 
which set of three Graph Areas are viewable: Integral, Primary, and Derivative, or Primary,
Derivative, and Second Derivative. There are Exploration Tools allowing flexible investigation
of all curves with {$variable} coordinates aligned.

interactionHint.value:
Get started by finding the Curve Manipulator. Grab manipulator to modify curve in any direction.
Use Exploration Tools to explore relationships between graphs in viewable graph set.

accessibleHelpTextCollapsed.value: Explore slope of line tangent to f curve at {$variable} coordinate of Tangent tool.

zero.value: At {$variable} equals {$x}, slope of line tangent to f is zero.

positive.value: At {$variable} equals {$x}, slope of line tangent to f is positive {$absoluteSlope}.

negative.value: At {$variable} equals {$x}, slope of line tangent to f is negative {$absoluteSlope}.

accessibleHelpTextCollapsed.value:
Explore net signed area under f curve between {$variable} equals 0 and current
{$variable} coordinate of Area Under Curve tool.

zero.value: Net signed area under f curve is zero between {$variable} equals 0 and {$x}.

positive.value: Net signed area under f curve is positive {$absoluteArea} between {$variable} equals 0 and {$x}.

negative.value: Net signed area under f curve is negative {$absoluteArea} between {$variable} equals 0 and {$x}.

accessibleHelpText.value: Add or remove Tangent Tool to make connections between graphs.
Add or remove vertical Reference Line to align {$variable} coordinates on all graphs.
Add or remove Area Under Curve Tool and shading under curve bounded by horizontal axis and f.
Show or hide coordinate grid on all graphs.
Show or hide f of {$variable} to compare your predicted shape to shape of f of {$variable}.

triangle.value: Rigid V with Corners on {$variable} Axis

tilt.value: Diagonal Tilt Pinned at Left Edge

continuousAndDifferentiable.value: f is continuous and differentiable at all points.

hasDiscontinuities.value: f is not differentiable at one or more discontinuities.

hasCusps.value: f is continuous but not differentiable at one or more cusps.

hasDiscontinuitiesAndCusps.value: f is not differentiable at one or more discontinuities and one or more cusps.

continuousAndDifferentiable.value: Predict f is continuous and differentiable at all points.

hasDiscontinuities.value: Predict f is not differentiable at one or more discontinuities.

hasCusps.value: Predict f is continuous but not differentiable at one or more cusps.

hasDiscontinuitiesAndCusps.value: Predict f is not differentiable at one or more discontinuities and one or more cusps.

continuous.value: Integral curve is continuous and represents definite integral from zero to {$variable} for f of {$variable}.
Derivative curve is continuous and differentiable at all points.

discontinuous.value: Derivative curve is not differentiable at one or more discontinuities.

continuous.value: Second derivative curve is continuous and differentiable at all points.

discontinuous.value: Second derivative curve is not differentiable at one or more discontinuities.

accessibleHelpText.value: Choose action to take on curve in Primary Graph Area.
Smooth sharp corners and discontinuities on curve in Primary Graph Area.
Reset curve to y equals zero, maintain curve manipulation settings.

primaryCurve.value: f and derived curves reset, settings unchanged.

predictCurve.value: Predict curve reset, other curves and settings unchanged.

accessibleHelpText.value: Undo most recent curve manipulation.

primaryCurve.value: Last manipulation removed from f and derived curves.

predictCurve.value: Last manipulation removed from predict curve only.

secondDerivative.value: Zoom In Second Derivative y Axis

accessibleHelpText.value: Zoom in y axis only.

secondDerivative.value: Zoom Out Second Derivative y Axis

accessibleHelpText.value: Zoom out y axis only.
Choose which curve is manipulable in Primary Graph Area.

Choose curve modification type for Curve Manipulator, then change curve in Primary Graph Area.
Find Curve Manipulator under Curve Manipulator and Settings.
Choose which set of Graph Areas to investigate and find relationships.

accessibleName.value: Integral, Primary, and Derivative Graph Areas

accessibleContextResponse.value: Primary Graph Area between Integral and Derivative

accessibleName.value: Primary, Derivative, and Second Derivative Graph Areas

accessibleContextResponse.value: Primary Graph Area above Derivative and Second Derivative

accessibleHelpText.value: Choose variable for horizontal axis.
Choose derivative notation.

accessibleContextResponse.value: Derivative notation uses f prime and f double prime.
Derivative notation shows ratio of change in y with respect to {$variable}.

accessibleHelpText.value: Choose how to display discontinuities in curves.
Adjust width of curve manipulation shape. Width ranges from {$min} to {$max} {$variable} axis units.
Adds a mode that allows you to predict f of {$variable}.
Show or hide curve to support predictions.

Move curve manipulator in any direction to set location, then space to grab and dynamically
manipulate curve using chosen Curve Manipulation Type.

Move predict curve manipulator in any direction to set location, then space to grab and 
dynamically manipulate curve using chosen Curve Manipulation Type.

Move vertical line horizontally to change {$variable} value and explore y values on all graphs.
Vertical line passes through all graphs at same {$variable} value.

Move vertical line horizontally to change {$variable} value and explore relationship between
steepness of visible line tangent to f at {$variable}, and y value on derivative curve at same
{$variable} coordinate. Information provides current {$variable} value, slope of line tangent
to f at {$variable}, and value of derivative at {$variable} on derivative curve.

Move vertical line horizontally to change {$variable} value and explore relationship between
cumulative net signed area under f up to current {$variable} value. Shaded area is bounded by
{$variable} axis and f curve. Vertical line passes through all graphs at same {$variable} value.
Information provides current {$variable} value, value of integral up to {$variable}, and
net signed area under f curve.

zero.value: net signed area is zero under f

positive.value: net signed area is positive {$absoluteArea} under f

negative.value: net signed area is negative {$absoluteArea} under f
